The ImplementationGuide uses package hl7.fhir.dk.core#2.0.0 released on 2022-09-14, but the most recent appropriate version is 3.5.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered

The ImplementationGuide uses package medcom.fhir.dk.messaging#2.1.0 released on 2023-10-31, but the most recent appropriate version is 4.0.1. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered

The ImplementationGuide uses package medcom.fhir.dk.terminology#1.4.0 released on 2023-07-11, but the most recent appropriate version is 2.0.2. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/core/StructureDefinition/medcom-core-patient'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '2.3.0', found versions: 2.0.1 (from medcom.fhir.dk.core#2.0.1), 2.3.0 (from medcom.fhir.dk.core#2.3.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/core/StructureDefinition/medcom-core-patient' to 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/core/StructureDefinition/medcom-core-patient|2.3.0'

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/terminology/ValueSet/medcom-acknowledgement-issue-details'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '1.5.0', found versions: 1.4.0 (from medcom.fhir.dk.terminology#1.4.0), 1.5.0 (from medcom.fhir.dk.terminology#1.5.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/terminology/ValueSet/medcom-acknowledgement-issue-details' to 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/terminology/ValueSet/medcom-acknowledgement-issue-details|1.5.0'

The slice definition for MessageHeader.destination:primary.extension has a minimum of 0 but the slices add up to a minimum of 1

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/terminology/ValueSet/medcom-messaging-messageTypes'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '1.5.0', found versions: 1.4.0 (from medcom.fhir.dk.terminology#1.4.0), 1.5.0 (from medcom.fhir.dk.terminology#1.5.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/terminology/ValueSet/medcom-messaging-messageTypes' to 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/terminology/ValueSet/medcom-messaging-messageTypes|1.5.0'

The definition for the element 'MessageHeader.event[x]' binds to the value set 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/terminology/ValueSet/medcom-messaging-messageTypes' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
